title: swertia tetrapetala subsp. micrantha
intro: Swertia tetrapetala subsp. micrantha is a subspecies of the Swertia tetrapetala plant, belonging to the Gentianaceae family, and is also known as Himalayan gentian or Himalayan gentian root. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The Swertia tetrapetala subsp. micrantha plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help in managing conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Swertia tetrapetala subsp. micrantha root is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
